title: Gemini Omni's Best Feature
summary: Google's Gemini Omni can add objects to existing video footage by accepting text, image, or audio descriptions and automatically handling lighting and shading. It enables real-time post-production-style object insertion into existing clips.
writeup: This video covers Gemini Omni's object insertion feature, which adds objects into existing video footage from text, image, or audio descriptions. The model automatically handles lighting and shading on the inserted objects, matching them to the source clip. The result is real-time, post-production-style insertion into existing video rather than full clip generation from scratch.
